description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and body, giving it a surreal, distorted appearance. The figure is dressed in urban attire, including a jacket, pants, and a cap, and appears to be in a dynamic, climbing or suspended pose. The arms and legs are stretched and angular, with the limbs extending far beyond typical human proportions, creating a spider-like silhouette. The face is visible and features a beard, while the hands and feet are simplified and blocky. The overall form is stylized and abstract, with sharp angles and a sense of motion. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, with visible folds and creases in the clothing.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated limbs, urban clothing, and a dynamic, suspended pose. The figure has a cap, jacket, and angular, stretched body parts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, cap, and the dramatic extension of both arms and legs, emphasizing the climbing or suspended posture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular bend of the limbs and the profile of the head, with one leg and arm more prominently extended.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and the full length of the stretched limbs, with the body appearing narrow and elongated.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other profile, showing the exaggerated leg and arm extension and the side of the torso.
attribute_clothing_type: urban jacket and pants with a cap
